query:
INSERT INTO uploaded_videos
SET
  token = ?,
  sha1_checksum = ?,
  filesize_bytes = ?,
  maybe_filename = ?,
  maybe_width = ?,
  maybe_height = ?,
  maybe_resolution = ?,
  maybe_detected_model_family = ?,
  maybe_detected_model_type = ?,
  maybe_report = ?,
  upload_ip_address = ?,
  created_at = NOW()
